suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'handleTimeout'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isPlaying, timeLeft, feedback, handleTimeout]

fix.text: [isPlaying, timeLeft, feedback, handleTimeout]

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

fix.text: unknown

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.

fix.text: never

suggestions.desc: Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
